name: provenance manifest decision_provenance carries an adrs array and an architect_session_id field
command: printf '{"decision_provenance":{"adrs":["0001"],"architect_session_id":"sess-1","decisions_referenced":["d1"]}}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check decision-provenance 2>out.txt && grep -q 'adrs_count=1' out.txt && grep -q 'architect_session_id=sess-1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
